expectations.text: The response invokes jira-comment-flow.sh add with --print-payload (or shows its output)
The response shows a preview heading like 'Proposed Jira write' or 'review before sending'
expectations.evidence: response includes 'Proposed Jira write — review before sending' heading

expectations.text: The response asks the user for confirmation before posting
expectations.evidence: response asks user to confirm before posting

expectations.text: No actual comment is posted (jira-comment-flow.sh not called without --print-payload)
The response invokes jira-comment-flow.sh delete with --describe (or shows its output)
The response explicitly labels the delete operation as irreversible
The response shows the DELETE method and the correct path /rest/api/3/issue/ENG-42/comment/10042
The response asks the user for confirmation before deleting
expectations.evidence: response asks user to confirm before deleting

expectations.text: No actual delete is made (jira-comment-flow.sh not called without --describe)
The response invokes jira-comment-flow.sh list directly (no --print-payload or --describe flag)
expectations.evidence: response invokes jira-comment-flow.sh list ENG-42 with no preview flag

expectations.text: The response does NOT show a 'Proposed Jira write' preview heading before the list command
expectations.evidence: no preview heading appears before the list invocation

expectations.text: The response does NOT ask the user for confirmation before running the list command
expectations.evidence: no confirmation gate presented for read-only list operation

expectations.text: The skill treats the list subcommand as read-only (skips the confirmation gate steps)
expectations.evidence: list executed directly without write-path gate
